items.headline: 2025-26 NBA Awards: Finalists for league accolades announced tonight
items.description: The finalists for the 7 major regular-season awards will be revealed tonight at 6 p.m. ET on NBC.

items.headline: Live Updates: 2026 NBA Playoffs, R1 | Celtics-76ers renew classic rivalry to open slate
items.description: Welcome to the second day of the 2026 NBA Playoffs! We've got four series tipping off, starting with Celtics-76ers at 1 ET on ABC.

items.headline: Starting 5: LeBron’s dimes lead Lakers, Joker & Murray take control, Knicks & Cavs take Playoff Game 1 wins
items.description: Four more Game 1s on ABC & NBC today, with Philly-Boston at 1 ET, Suns-Thunder at 3:30, Magic-Pistons at 6:30 and Blazers-Spurs at 9.

items.headline: Rockets-Lakers Game 1: Luke Kennard steps up for short-handed L.A.
items.description: The veteran guard provides L.A. a needed jolt while LeBron James notches a stellar double-double to drop Houston.

items.headline: LeBron James, Bronny James make history as 1st father-son duo to play in a Playoff game
items.description: By earning minutes in Game 1 vs. Houston, LeBron and Bronny become the 1st father-son duo to play in a Playoff game.

items.headline: Knicks-Hawks Game 1: No letdown in New York as fresh playoff run begins
items.description: The Knicks weather a late comeback attempt by the Hawks, turning in a 113-102 victory to secure a 1-0 series lead.

items.headline: Timberwolves-Nuggets Game 1: Denver leans on star duo to claim series opener
items.description: Nikola Jokić and Jamal Murray combine for 55-18-18 while Denver dominates the middle quarters to win Game 1.

items.headline: Cavaliers-Raptors Game 1: Cleveland flips the season series script
items.description: The Cavs, taken down 3 times by the Raptors in regular-season play, open their first-round series in dominant fashion.

items.headline: Rockets All-Star Kevin Durant ruled out for Game 1 vs. Lakers with right knee injury
items.description: Durant suffers injury in Wednesday practice, leaving his right knee 'tender and tough to bend in certain ways.'

items.headline: 20 players younger than 23 set to step onto NBA Playoffs stage
items.description: As the 2026 NBA Playoffs get rolling, these 20 standout youngsters are the ones to watch in the postseason.

items.headline: Live Updates: 2026 NBA Playoffs, First Round | Home Teams All Win Game 1
items.description: The 2026 NBA Playoffs begin today! All four home teams took care of Game 1

items.headline: Starting 5: History on Day 1: NBA Playoffs start today
items.description: The NBA Playoffs begin today! LeBron & KD meet, Joker & Ant run it back, Knicks & Hawks tip off and Cavs host rising Raptors.

items.headline: Warriors coach Steve Kerr uncertain about his future, notes ‘these jobs all have an expiration date’
items.description: Warriors coach Steve Kerr isn’t sure about his future, saying after the team's season ended Friday that he’ll take some time.

items.headline: Jalen Green's 36 points guides Suns past Warriors to clinch No. 8 seed in West
items.description: The Suns claim the No. 8 seed in the West and will face the defending NBA champion Oklahoma City Thunder on Sunday.

items.headline: NBA Playoffs: What to expect in Thunder-Suns series
items.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander and the Thunder battle the overachieving Suns with eyes focused on back-to-back titles.
